message:
fix: Zig layout improvements — cluster bboxes, label collision, arrow rendering

- Return Graphviz cluster bounding boxes from Zig for non-overlapping groups
  (replaces TS-side bounding box computation from child positions)
- Add label collision detection in Zig layout: estimates label width from
  text length, detects overlapping/too-close labels (24px min gap), shifts apart
- Pass edge labels through to WASM so Zig can compute label positions
- Use elbowed=false for Graphviz-routed arrows so Excalidraw renders exact
  polyline path with proper arrowheads (elbowed mode ignores custom points)
- Remove duplicate sp/ep spline points that created tiny segments near nodes
- Auto-size group label width from text length (was hardcoded to 100px)
- Increase nodesep 0.5→1.5 and ranksep 1.0→1.2 for better spacing
- Add cluster subgraph margin for Graphviz cluster separation
- Add gviz_add_subgraph/gviz_subgraph_add_node to C bridge
